CMS Chronic Conditions Data Warehouse (CCW) Data Dictionary
Medicare Part D Beneficiary Auto-Assignment File
Version 1.2 (April 2018)
Long SAS NAME Label Type Length
BENE_ID CCW Beneficiary ID CHAR 15
REF_YEAR Part D Plan Enrollment Year NUM 4
LIS_MONTHS Beneficiary Months of Low Income Subsidy NUM 2
AUTO_ASSIGNED_FLAG Auto-Assignment Flag for 1 or More Enrollement Transactions CHAR 1
CHOOSER Beneficiary Self-Selector Indicator CHAR 1
CRNT_PREV_YR_CHOOSER Self-Selector in Current or Previous
